name: London
description: London, a vibrant tapestry woven from centuries of history and cutting-edge modernity, invites you to explore its iconic landmarks and hidden treasures. From the regal grandeur of Buckingham Palace to the bustling energy of Trafalgar Square, every corner tells a story. Immerse yourself in world-class museums, catch a West End show, or simply wander through charming neighborhoods and riverside paths. With its diverse culinary scene, royal parks, and unparalleled shopping, London promises an unforgettable adventure for every type of traveler.

hotels.name: The Savoy
hotels.description: An iconic luxury hotel on the Strand, offering unparalleled service and elegant rooms. Guests enjoy exquisite dining and a prime location near Covent Garden and the West End theatres.

hotels.name: Shangri-La Hotel at The Shard, London
hotels.description: Occupying levels 34-52 of The Shard, this hotel boasts breathtaking panoramic views of London. Indulge in world-class amenities, including an infinity pool and award-winning dining.

hotels.name: The Z Hotel Piccadilly
hotels.description: Compact and stylish rooms perfect for budget-conscious travelers right in the heart of Piccadilly. Offers a convenient base for exploring Leicester Square and Soho on foot.

hotels.name: citizenM London Bankside
hotels.description: A contemporary hotel with smart rooms controlled by an iPad, located moments from Tate Modern and Borough Market. Features a vibrant lobby and a 24/7 canteen.

hotels.name: The Rubens at the Palace
hotels.description: Directly opposite Buckingham Palace's Royal Mews, this opulent hotel offers a truly royal experience with themed rooms and impeccable service. Enjoy traditional afternoon tea and fine dining.
